docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2015 BY MARK R. MURRAY. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT. WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFFF SWORN AND TESTIFIED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. CLERK: B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY DIAB, EMAN ESPARZA, FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DIAB, EMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESPARZA, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPARZA, FRANCISCO
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAB, EMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPARZA, FRANCISCO $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00, COURT FINDS DEFENDANT COMITTED FRAUD IN CASHING FALSE CHECKS ON PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT, & DEFENDANT EMBEZZLED FROM PLAINTIFF WITH PURCHASES IN HER HAME FROM SPRINT WITHOUT PERMISSION OR HER KNOWLEDGE.DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RECOVER ALL PHONES & ITEMS HE PURCHASED FROM SPRINT IN THE NAME OF PLAINTIFF, & RETURN TO PLAINTIFF NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 3, 2015. IF DEFENDANT RETURNS ANY SUCH ITEMS TO PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN SUCH ITEMS TO SPRINT FOR WHATEVER CREDIT PLAINTIFF CAN OBTAIN FROM SPRINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
